title: _changeset.next_version — input
description: Input for the semver bump. Mirrors plugins/sulis/scripts/_changeset.py::next_version(current, tier). Series-agnostic — works identically for plugin (0.x) and marketplace (1.x) series per ADR-003 of release-train.

tier.description: the bump tier; null means 'no bump' and returns current unchanged
